rows.label: qev013204_MSG0001
rows.name:
This... Does this mean you
completely wiped out my pawns?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0002
rows.name:
You sure did as you pleased while
I was away on a little errand...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0003
rows.name:
Hmph... This is exactly why I said
those pests called BLADEs should
be exterminated immediately.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_JNK0010
rows.name: Query

rows.label: qev013204_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask who she is.

rows.label: qev013204_JNK0020
rows.name: Fight

rows.label: qev013204_SEL0021
rows.name: Prepare for battle.

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0004
rows.name:
Silence! A lower lifeform like
you is a quintillion years too
early to ask me questions![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0005
rows.name:
Aaaaah!! I need to exterminate such eyesores
even a fraction of a second sooner![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0006
rows.name:
Ahahahahaha! A lower lifeform
like you is trying to defy me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0007
rows.name:
You really are annoying! I need
to exterminate you even a
fraction of a second sooner![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0008
rows.name:
No... Simply exterminating
you is boring...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0016
rows.name:
I'll pierce you with pins
while you're still alive and
turn you into a specimen!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0009
rows.name:
Fufu, you are quite lucky to become part
of the great Tempera's collection![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0010
rows.name: Tch... What is it at a time like this![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0011
rows.name:
What... a counterattack? ...Understood,
Sister... I'll head there immediately...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0012
rows.name: Hmph... Pity. Time's up for today.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0013
rows.name:
But if you Earthlings insist on crawling
out of that bug cage you call NLA and
sniffing around where you don't belong...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0014
rows.name:
We will eventually fight.
Enjoy your freedom dancing
alongside death while you can.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev013204_MSG0015
rows.name:
When that time comes... I will
make you taste every possible
agony! Farewell, little insect![ST:wait ]
